boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block disposition permits release only on exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition. PAY-TES-074 (account 7205) does not match CLR-TES-074 (account 7025). FLAG-TES-074 shows visible flag without matching disposition in CLR-TES-074.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-TES-074-P requires exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition. CLR-TES-074 covers account 7025; PAY-TES-074 releases account 7205. Mismatch blocks release.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Account number discrepancy and visible flag without clearance disposition leave the source boundary open. CLR-TES-074 scope applicability to PAY-TES-074 remains unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance must precede release; CLR-TES-074 does not cover PAY-TES-074 account 7205. FLAG-TES-074 disposition linkage to CLR-TES-074 is absent. Exact-match precondition per STD-TES-074-P is not satisfied.

final_answer: Payment release cannot proceed. PAY-TES-074 references account 7205, while CLR-TES-074 covers account 7025 only. This account mismatch violates STD-TES-074-P exact-match requirement for name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition. Additionally, FLAG-TES-074 remains visible without a matching disposition in CLR-TES-074. Source boundary remains open; clarification on CLR-TES-074 applicability and flag disposition is required before any release.
open_blockers: Account number discrepancy (7205 vs 7025) prevents exact match
FLAG-TES-074 visible flag lacks matching disposition in CLR-TES-074
CLR-TES-074 applicability to PAY-TES-074 is unresolved
